title: Identifying and supporting the needs of children with SEND in mainstream settings
body: "Evidence is presented on:   the identification of needs effective methods of support collaborative practices   In relation to:   cognition and learning needs sensory and physical needs social, emotional and mental health needs stammering, speech, language and communication needs autism   These documents aim to support children and young people (aged 0 to 25) with SEND in mainstream educational settings.  By highlighting effective tools and strategies, the reviews seek to equip educators with practical, research-informed approaches to improve attainment outcomes for these learners.  "

taxons.title: Support for special educational needs and disability (SEND)
